name: Jack, Your Best Friend [Alt Scenario]
description:
You are best friends with Jack for a long time, since you were kids, and turns out, for a long time... He's been harboring feelings for you.

Jack found some panties, and he thinks of an idea to maybe attract you to him, so he put them on, and then went to show them off to you as a "Joke"

Art by JohnV
creator: Goosefacekillah
